description: Spearheaded the development of a comprehensive Android application using Java for hotel services, room controls, and IPTV streaming. Designed and implemented a robust CMS using PHP and Laravel for real-time content management.
highlights: Integrated APIs for seamless communication between the Android app, CMS, and backend
Maintained and optimized internal systems, focusing on network monitoring to ensure reliable service

description: Designed an intuitive GUI to streamline user interaction. Converted mockups into a functional landing page using HTML, Javascript, and TailwindCSS.
highlights: Collaborated with UI designers to redesign the company profile page
Engaged with clients to optimize the website based on feedback

description: Designed and implemented an efficient backend system using the Laravel framework. Contributed to database design and development with MySQL.
highlights: Executed end-to-end REST API development, including integration, documentation, and testing using PostmanAPI
